requirements: Replace MacWhisper with direct Whisper CLI integration
Add capability to generate meeting notes in markdown format from transcriptions
Implement detection and extraction of action items from transcriptions
Create a structured output format with meeting overview, key topics, and action items
Add proper error handling for all stages of the pipeline
Create a new script called generate_meeting_notes.sh to process transcripts into meeting notes format

output_examples.name: Meeting Notes Format
output_examples.description: Format for the generated meeting notes markdown file
output_examples.content:
# [Meeting Title] - [Date] [Time]

## Meeting Overview
- **Date:** [Date and Time]
- **Attendees:** [Names of participants]
- **Duration:** [Meeting duration]
- **Recording:** [Recording filename]

## Key Topics Discussed

### 1. [Topic Name]
**Owner:** [Topic Owner]  
**Status:** [Status information]

- [Key point discussed]
- [Key point discussed]
- [Key point discussed]

### 2. [Topic Name]
**Owner:** [Topic Owner]  
**Status:** [Status information]

- [Key point discussed]
- [Key point discussed]
- [Key point discussed]

## Action Items

1. [Action Item] - **Owner:** [Name] - **Due:** [Date]
2. [Action Item] - **Owner:** [Name] - **Due:** [Date]
3. [Action Item] - **Owner:** [Name] - **Due:** [Date]

## Next Steps

- [Next step]
- [Next step]
- [Next step]

new_files.description: Script to generate meeting notes from transcriptions
